headline: Tech Rebounds After Global AI/Chip Selloff
detail: Chip and tech stocks are recovering after a sharp one-day drop, which is directly relevant to your heavily concentrated book. The bounce is encouraging but the article flagging 17 prior one-day semiconductor plunges suggests these moves can precede further weakness - don't mistake a bounce for an all-clear. SMH and your chip-adjacent names like AVGO and CRWD are most sensitive here.

headline: Congress Bill Would Make Tech Pay AI Data Center Energy Costs
detail: If passed, this legislation forces AI-driven tech companies to absorb their own energy infrastructure costs, which squeezes margins. This hits names like PLTR, CRWD, and AVGO that are deeply tied to AI infrastructure spending. It's not law yet, but it's a headwind worth pricing into your thesis on these names.

headline: SK Hynix Plans $29B Nasdaq Listing
detail: A massive chip-sector capital raise of this size can pressure valuations across semiconductors by flooding the market with new supply of chip-sector equity. SMH and AVGO are your most direct exposures here. Watch whether this weighs on the current rebound or gets absorbed cleanly.

headline: Brent Oil Falls to Multi-Month Lows
detail: Falling oil is a mild positive for energy-intensive AI data centers and tech broadly, slightly offsetting the energy cost bill concern. It won't move your names dramatically, but lower input costs are a quiet tailwind for the sector's margin story.
